channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Phase 2 of West Bengal Assembly Elections Sees High-Stakes Voting Across 142 Constituencies
item.description: The second phase of the West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026 is underway on April 29, covering 142 constituencies across seven districts including Kolkata, Howrah, North and South 24 Parganas, Nadia, H...

item.title: Internal ODM Tensions Rise as Orengo Declares Himself Party Leader, Omanyo Pushes Back
item.description: The Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) is facing fresh internal tensions after Siaya governor James Orengo declared himself the 'people’s party leader' within ODM. Orengo defended the Linda Mwananchi fa...

item.title: No credible news available regarding James Comey indictment claim
item.description: The news article linked reports that former FBI Director James Comey has been indicted over a seashell photo and allegedly threatened former President Donald Trump. However, the article text could not...

item.title: Courage Hub SA Opens to Support and Protect Whistleblowers
item.description: On Freedom Day in Johannesburg, Courage Hub SA was officially launched as a support centre for whistleblowers in South Africa. The initiative aims to offer a safe space for individuals who expose wron...

item.title: Sault Ste. Marie police investigate weekend robbery involving teens with a knife
item.description: Police in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario, reported a weekend robbery in which several teenagers threatened staff with a knife. The incident occurred at a local establishment, prompting a swift response fro...

item.title: Delta police officer arrested for killing suspect, to face disciplinary action
item.description: For Delta State, one police officer, ASP Nuhu Usman, don land trouble after e shoot and kill one man called Mene Ogidi, 28, for Effurun, Uvwie Local Government Area. The incident happen for April 26, ...

item.title: Albanese rules out gas export tax to maintain energy partnerships and fuel supply
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has decided against introducing a new tax on gas exports, prioritising Australia's fuel security and its relationships with key Asian partners, including Japan, South K...

item.title: Kompas VC Adapts Investment Strategy to Regional Differences and Long-Term Industrial Opportunities
item.description: Kompas VC, a European venture capital firm, is addressing the complexities of investing in a world increasingly divided by cultural, political, and economic differences. The firm has launched a new €1...

item.title: ISIS claims attack in Adamawa killing at least 29 civilians
item.description: Na so ISIS don claim say dem carry out one attack for Adamawa State, wey reportedly don kill at least 29 people. The attack happen for one rural community for northeast Nigeria, wey dey border areas w...

item.title: Nine Suspects Killed and Two Police Officers Injured During CCD Operations in Punjab
item.description: On Tuesday, nine suspects were killed and two police officials injured during multiple encounters with the Crime Control Department (CCD) across Punjab. In Lahore, six suspects lost their lives in sep...

item.title: Sunday Times Editor Suspended Amid National Lottery Misappropriation Allegations
item.description: Makhudu Sefara, the editor of the Sunday Times and current chairperson of the South African National Editors’ Forum (SANEF), has been placed on special leave by Arena Holdings amid allegations of misa...

item.title: Philippine Navy and Allies Carry Out Joint Refueling and Maritime Exercises off Bajo de Masinloc
item.description: The Philippine Navy, together with its international allies, conducted a joint refueling drill and maritime operations off the waters of Bajo de Masinloc. This activity is part of the annual Balikatan...

item.title: King Charles emphasises US-UK cooperation and Nato commitment during White House visit
item.description: During a state dinner at the White House on 28 April, King Charles III publicly commended American leadership and highlighted the enduring strength of the US-UK alliance. He acknowledged the United St...

item.title: Spring fiscal update highlights Canada’s spending and investment challenges
item.description: The spring economic update from Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government has left analysts and the public with more questions than answers. While Carney entered office with a promise to reduce spending...

item.title: NHLS Launches Real-Time National Dashboard to Improve Diabetes Management in South Africa

item.title: Australian player Bazzana debuts in MLB with Men at Work tribute
item.description: Australian baseball player Bazzana made his Major League Baseball debut for the Cleveland Guardians, marking a significant milestone in his sporting career. The moment was made particularly memorable ...

item.title: Trump highlights King Charles' stance against Iran acquiring nuclear weapons amid Middle East tensions
item.description: During a state dinner at the White House on April 28, 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Britain's King Charles does not wish Iran to acquire nuclear weapons. This statement brought the ong...

item.title: Advertising watchdog bans face serum claim of reducing apparent age by five years
item.description: The Advertising Standards Authority (ASA) has banned an advertisement for the Eucerin Hyaluron-Filler Epigenetic Serum, priced at £49, after it was deemed misleading. The billboard suggested that the ...

item.title: Government promotes Alternative Learning System for out-of-school youth and adults
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) is encouraging out-of-school youth and adults to take advantage of the Alternative Learning System (ALS), a government program designed to provide flexible educatio...

item.title: MLB Addresses Controversial Ninth-Inning Call in Padres-Cubs Game
item.description: Major League Baseball addressed a disputed call during Monday night’s game between the San Diego Padres and Chicago Cubs, where a ball hit by Cubs infielder Matt Shaw down the third base line appeared...
